'''rawotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foambow|foambow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foambow|foambow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rawotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræwetheth|ræwetheth]] || [[word:ræwethej|ræwethej]] || [[word:ræwethesh|ræwethesh]] || [[word:ræwethe|ræwethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawowothoth|rawowothoth]] || [[word:rawowothoj|rawowothoj]] || [[word:rawowothosh|rawowothosh]] || [[word:rawowotho|rawowotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawothoth|rawothoth]] || [[word:rawothoj|rawothoj]] || [[word:rawothosh|rawothosh]] || [[word:rawotho|rawotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawofthoth|rawofthoth]] || [[word:rawofthoj|rawofthoj]] || [[word:rawofthosh|rawofthosh]] || [[word:rawofthof|rawofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawothotho|rawothotho]] || [[word:rawothojo|rawothojo]] || [[word:rawothosho|rawothosho]] || [[word:rawothoko|rawothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawothoth|rawothoth]] || [[word:rawothoj|rawothoj]] || [[word:rawothosh|rawothosh]] || [[word:rawotho|rawotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawothothol|rawothothol]] || [[word:rawothojol|rawothojol]] || [[word:rawothoshol|rawothoshol]] || [[word:rawothokol|rawothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawothothotho|rawothothotho]] || [[word:rawothojojo|rawothojojo]] || [[word:rawothoshosho|rawothoshosho]] || [[word:rawothoko|rawothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawothothon|rawothothon]] || [[word:rawothojon|rawothojon]] || [[word:rawothoshon|rawothoshon]] || [[word:rawothokon|rawothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawothothoro|rawothothoro]] || [[word:rawothojoro|rawothojoro]] || [[word:rawothoshoro|rawothoshoro]] || [[word:rawothokoro|rawothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
